summary: Comprehensive testing of AI-powered data analysis platform completed. Core functionality working excellently with successful file upload, AI-driven dashboard generation, intelligent KPI creation, contextual visualizations, and meaningful insights generation.

ui_bugs.issue: Application resets to initial upload screen after some time, losing dashboard state

integration_issues.issue: Chart download buttons not consistently found with data-testid selectors
Filters tab not found during navigation testing

passed_tests: Backend API health check and all endpoints (18/18 - 100% success)
File upload with CSV, Excel, JSON support
AI-powered dashboard generation with domain detection
Smart KPI generation relevant to data context (financial metrics)
Contextual chart creation (line, bar, pie charts)
AI insights banner with intelligent analysis in French
AI analysis endpoint with Claude Sonnet 4.5

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor UI navigation issues)
success_percentage.ai_integration: 100% (AI analysis, insights, and dashboard generation working perfectly)
